'''chakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kissably|kissably]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kissably|kissably]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chakate|chakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chakatesher|chakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chakatesherĂ«m|chakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chakatero|chakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chakateshĂ«|chakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chakateshĂ«m|chakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichakatero|gokichakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichakateshĂ«|gokichakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichakateshĂ«m|gokichakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochakankerom|gochakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochakankeshĂ«|gochakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochakankeshĂ«m|gochakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochakankeya|gochakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chakaterom|chakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chakatemu|chakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chakateya|chakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichakaterom|gokichakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichakatemu|gokichakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichakateya|gokichakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chakakate|chakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chakakatesher|chakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chakakatesherĂ«m|chakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chakakatero|chakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chakakateshĂ«|chakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chakakateshĂ«m|chakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichakakatero|gokichakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichakakateshĂ«|gokichakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichakakateshĂ«m|gokichakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochakakankerom|gochakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochakakankeshĂ«|gochakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochakakankeshĂ«m|gochakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochakakankeya|gochakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chakakaterom|chakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chakakatemu|chakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chakakateya|chakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichakakaterom|gokichakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichakakatemu|gokichakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichakakateya|gokichakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠte|chĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠtesher|chĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠtero|chĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠkĂŠtero|gokichĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠterom|chĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠtemu|chĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠkĂŠteya|chĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠkĂŠterom|gokichĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠkĂŠteya|gokichĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafkafte|chafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafkaftesher|chafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafkaftesherĂ«m|chafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafkaftero|chafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafkafteshĂ«|chafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafkafteshĂ«m|chafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafkaftero|gokichafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafkafteshĂ«|gokichafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafkafteshĂ«m|gokichafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafkafnkerom|gochafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafkafnkeshĂ«|gochafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafkafnkeshĂ«m|gochafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafkafnkeya|gochafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafkafterom|chafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafkaftemu|chafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafkafteya|chafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafkafterom|gokichafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafkaftemu|gokichafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafkafteya|gokichafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
